message:
feat: protocol error auto-recovery with circuit breaker and retry (wa-2c50)

Add protocol_recovery module with:
- ProtocolErrorKind classification (Recoverable/Transient/Permanent)
- RecoveryEngine with circuit breaker integration and exponential backoff
- FrameCorruptionDetector with sliding window heuristics
- ConnectionHealthTracker state machine (Healthy→Degraded→Corrupted→Dead)
- Feature-gated DirectMuxError classification (#[cfg(vendored, unix)])
- RecoveryConfig presets for capture and interactive workloads
- 40 tests covering all components

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
